description: Detects command injection risks in Python: os.system, os.popen, subprocess.run/call/Popen with dynamic arguments. Simplified from Rust: flags all attribute calls on os or subprocess objects. Cannot verify shell=True or non-literal args without #match? predicate support.

flag.message: Command execution call detected -- verify dynamic user input is not passed to os.system, os.popen, subprocess.run, subprocess.call, or subprocess.Popen
